creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Staging.
- USES=gmake.
- Set CPPFLAGS instead of CFLAGS to fix some warnings about missing
  headers during configure.
- Remove prefix from MAKE_ARGS.  It is set correctly by configure in
  config.mak.autogen.
- Replace some MAKE_ENV with MAKE_ARGS to make sure the options are
  always disabled even when configure detects them.
- ICONV option: let configure autodetect iconv.  NEEDS_LIBICONV isn't
  valid on FreeBSD 10 for instance.

Redports: https://redports.org/buildarchive/20140212160900-57988/
